children.name: Lychnorhiza
children.description: Lychnorhiza — a genus of lychnorhizid jellyfish in the family Lychnorhizidae.

children.name: Lychnorhiza arubae
children.description: Lychnorhiza arubae is a species of true jellyfish within the genus Lychnorhiza.

children.name: Lychnorhiza lucerna
children.description: Lychnorhiza lucerna or Marbled Jelly is a species of jellyfish in the order Rhizostomeae.

children.name: Lychnorhiza malayensis
children.description: Lychnorhiza malayensis — a species in the genus Lychnorhiza, family Lychnorhizidae. Also known as lychnorhizid jellyfish.

children.name: Anomalorhiza
children.description: Anomalorhiza — a genus of lychnorhizid jellyfish in the family Lychnorhizidae.

children.name: Pseudorhiza
children.description: Pseudorhiza — a genus of lychnorhizid jellyfish in the family Lychnorhizidae.

children.name: Pseudorhiza aurosa
children.description: Pseudorhiza aurosa is a species of true jellyfish within the family Lychnorhizidae found around Australia.

children.name: Pseudorhiza haeckeli
children.description: Pseudorhiza haeckeli, or Haeckel's jelly, is a species of cnidarian of the family Lychnorhizidae.
